title: Airbus A320 prebuilt parts source discovery

requestedComponents.label: cockpit shell and main panel blockout
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find free/open prebuilt A320 cockpit meshes for possible Blender inspection after source approval.

requestedComponents.label: pilot or first-officer chair
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find standalone A320 pilot-chair candidates with clear license leads and manageable geometry.

requestedComponents.label: FCU/glareshield and autopilot panel parts
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find FCU/glareshield candidates from downloadable meshes or home-cockpit printables.

requestedComponents.label: side-stick, side-stick mount, or side cabinet candidates
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find side-stick area parts and record whether they are exact A320 cockpit pieces, simulator mounts, or home-cockpit approximations.

requestedComponents.label: pedestal, RMP, transponder, knobs, and throttle-related parts
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Find pedestal/control candidates and record license, format, cockpit section, and assembly risk.
